note: SYNTHETIC teaching case (not a real patient variant). A nonsense variant in the LAST exon: it escapes nonsense-mediated decay and removes only a small, non-critical C-terminal region. A tool that applies PVS1 at full strength would over-call this Pathogenic. CuraVar's PVS1 decision tree downgrades it, so the honest verdict is Uncertain.

variant.inheritance: AD (synthetic teaching gene; LoF is a disease mechanism)

evidence.snippet: Nonsense variant located in the last exon; the premature stop escapes nonsense-mediated decay and truncates ~4% of the C-terminus, a region with no known critical function.
